description: EX-1: missing lineage blocks auto-split and opens manual chart review. EX-3: a midway failure rolls back to the merged state with a P0 alert. AC-4: unapproved unmerges are refused.

cases.name: EX-1: no retained lineage — auto-split refused, manual chart-review workflow opened
EX-3: a midway restore failure rolls back to the merged state with a P0 data-integrity alert
AC-4: an unmerge without an attributed operator is refused
